channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 4 com severidade Alta
• 2 novas CVEs
• 0 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

📰 Unlocking the Full Potential of Programmable Infrastructure with VMware Cloud Foundation 9.1 – New Features and Capabilities
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
It is our pleasure to announce the general availability of VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9.1. This release is the culmination of our efforts to deliver an API-first private cloud platform that fulfills the promise of providing programmable infrastructure to our customers and partners. What was once a siloed platform with discrete APIs and fragmented automation …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/25/unlocking-the-full-potential-of-programmable-infrastructure-with-vmware-cloud-foundation-9-1-new-features-and-capabilities/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Ghost CMS CVE-2026-26980 Exploited to Hijack 700+ Sites for ClickFix Attacks
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.4
Resumo:
Threat actors are exploiting a recently disclosed critical security flaw in Ghost CMS to inject malicious JavaScript code with an aim to fuel ClickFix attacks. According to QiAnXin XLab, the activity involves the exploitation of CVE-2026-26980 (CVSS score: 9.4), an SQL injection vulnerability in Ghost's Content API that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to read arbitrary data from the
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/ghost-cms-cve-2026-26980-exploited-to.html
 
📰 Lazarus Deploys RemotePE Memory-Only RAT Against Financial and Crypto Firms
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have shed light on a cross-platform malware called RemotePE that has been put to use by the North Korea-linked Lazarus Group in attacks targeting financial and cryptocurrency organizations. RemotePE, per NCC Group subsidiary Fox-IT, is part of a multi-stage attack chain that involves two loaders tracked as DPAPILoader and RemotePELoader.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/lazarus-deploys-remotepe-memory-only.html
 
📰 TrapDoor Supply Chain Attack Spreads Credential-Stealing Malware via npm, PyPI, and CratesIO
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A new coordinated cross-ecosystem software supply chain attack campaign has targeted npm, PyPI, and Crates.io to distribute credential-stealing malware. The campaign, codenamed TrapDoor, spans more than 34 malicious packages across over 384 versions. The earliest activity was recorded on May 22, 2026, at 8:20 p.m. UTC, with new packages published to the ecosystems in waves from a cluster of
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/trapdoor-supply-chain-attack-spreads.html
 
📰 FBI warns of Kali365 phishing service targeting Microsoft 365 accounts
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The FBI is warning about the Kali365 phishing-as-a-service platform (PhaaS) that is used to hijack Microsoft 365 accounts by abusing OAuth device code authentication to steal session tokens and bypass multi-factor authentication (MFA).
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/fbi-warns-of-kali365-phishing-service-targeting-microsoft-365-accounts/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 USN-8299-1: Rclone vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 4.0
Resumo:
It was discovered that Rclone incorrectly handled authorization in the remote control API. An attacker could possibly use this issue to obtain sensitive information. (CVE-2026-41176) It was discovered that Rclone incorrectly handled backend instantiation via the remote control API. An attacker could possibly use this issue to execute arbitrary code. This issue only affected Ubuntu 24.04 LTS, Ubuntu 25.10 and Ubuntu 2...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8299-1
 
📰 USN-8300-1: ngtcp2 vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Zou Dikai discovered that ngtcp2 serialized peer transport parameters into a fixed 1024-byte stack buffer without bounds checking. When qlog was enabled, a remote attacker could possibly use this issue to execute arbitrary code.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8300-1
 
📰 Search and rescue teams respond to a major Russian attack on Kyiv overnight - WFAA
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias dos dias 24/05/2026 e 25/05/2026.
